title: SPARC Segmentation Conversion: Binary Mask Tracings to MBF XML
author: Maci Heal
license_note: Confirmed via CrossRef DOI metadata: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.bchjit4n

steps.title: Open binary mask tracings (
steps.instruction: Open binary mask tracings (.tif) into program window.

steps.title: Select the Outline Objects icon from the Trace ribbon
steps.instruction: Select the Outline Objects icon from the Trace ribbon.

steps.title: Click on a black or white...
steps.instruction: Click on a black or white pixel on the binary mask tracings to automatically contour the representative object. Repeat until all objects are contoured.

steps.title: Add subject metadata and select criteria...
steps.instruction: Add subject metadata and select criteria for anatomic term list in the SPARC Vocabulary Services welcome dialog.

steps.title: Choose the approrpiate vocabulary term from the contour selection toolbar
steps.instruction: Choose the approrpiate vocabulary term from the contour selection toolbar.
